parameters.query:
INSERT INTO "update_extension_services" (
  "ACTION", "RUN_STATUS", "PROGRESS_VALUE", "RUN_AFTER", "LAST_RUN", "LAST_UPDATE"
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.normalized.ACTION }}',
  {{ $json.normalized.RUN_STATUS }},
  {{ $json.normalized.PROGRESS_VALUE }},
  {{ $json.normalized.RUN_AFTER }},
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT ("ACTION")
DO UPDATE SET
  "RUN_STATUS" = EXCLUDED."RUN_STATUS",
  "PROGRESS_VALUE" = EXCLUDED."PROGRESS_VALUE",
  "RUN_AFTER" = EXCLUDED."RUN_AFTER",
  "LAST_UPDATE" = NOW()
WHERE (
  "update_extension_services"."RUN_STATUS" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."RUN_STATUS" OR
  "update_extension_services"."PROGRESS_VALUE" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."PROGRESS_VALUE" OR
  "update_extension_services"."RUN_AFTER" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."RUN_AFTER"
);
